summary: Dejah Thoris explains the volatile nature of radium projectiles to Carter, noting their danger in sunlight. She then reveals the hostility she faces from the older Thark women, who are forcing her into menial labor (mixing radium powder) due to jealousy of her status.
emotional_arc:

- Observational shots of the older Thark women performing their tasks/watching her.

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH013_SC002

- chapter_id: `CH013`
- scene_title: `To provide exposition on Martian technology and introduce the social...`

## Production Intent

To provide exposition on Martian technology and introduce the social conflict/jealousy facing Dejah Thoris.

## Storyboard

Dejah Thoris explains the volatile nature of radium projectiles to Carter, noting their danger in sunlight. She then reveals the hostility she faces from the older Thark women, who are forcing her into menial labor (mixing radium powder) due to jealousy of her status.
